texto: Leadership is detachment: detachment from material goods, detachment from feelings as well as personal detachment. To lead is to get rid of the filters of the mind and the addictions of the heart, is to see through the fog not only the objectives clearly but also the way to pursue them.
explicacao: Citação de K. Von Novack sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Leadership is detachment: detachment from material goods, detachment from feelings as well as per…” articula reflexao, leadership, detachment em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
